summary: campaign-C Task 2 (probe registry) PASS (8/10, almost) at MAX_ROUNDS. Built docs/html/probes-registry.html (7-row canonical registry: symbol/name/quantity/what-it-bounds/module + explicit I_G-vs-shared-spectral-capacity section), added a probes navgroup to all 15 topnavs, added an index card + foundation pointer, canonicalized every probe mention site-wide to registry name+symbol (old umbrella 'spectral channel-MI'/'spectral channel mutual information' and 'capPVI'/'cap-PVI' eliminated; J/V_cap/CLUB/SDL/I_G applied verbatim), and reconciled the synthesis glossary to defer to the registry. Reviewer ruled em-dash site-wide debt and post-definition 'negentropy' shorthand both out of Task-2 scope (owned by per-page cleanup Tasks 4/5/6). No GPU, no new claim.
